message:
fix(db,cli,server,tools): durability probe hardening, message cleanup, and TUI thread improvements

Durability probes (queries.rs):
- Use open_sqlite_file_with_recovery for probe connections
- Add PRAGMA initialization to probe connections
- Add cleanup_committed_message_after_consistency_failure for orphaned messages
- Add is_hard_post_commit_probe_error and advisory logging helpers
- New fetch_inbox_unread variant for urgent-unread view

CLI agent resolution (context.rs, lib.rs):
- Handle case-duplicate agents with LIMIT 2 + ambiguity check
- Add case-insensitive agent resolution tests
- Streamline tool directory rendering

Robot mode (robot.rs):
- Enhanced robot output format for machine consumption

Resources (resources.rs):
- Use fetch_inbox_unread for views/urgent-unread to exclude read messages
- Add test for urgent_unread_view_excludes_read_messages

TUI (messages.rs, threads.rs):
- Enhanced thread and message rendering improvements

Server (lib.rs):
- Simplified server initialization and warmup paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -9436,7 +9436,7 @@ fn handle_projects_adopt_with_conn(
     let duplicate_agent_rows = conn
         .query_sync(
             "SELECT s.name AS name FROM agents s \
-             INNER JOIN agents d ON s.name = d.name \
+             INNER JOIN agents d ON s.name = d.name COLLATE NOCASE \
              WHERE s.project_id = ? AND d.project_id = ? \
              ORDER BY s.name",
             &[
